Overrides.Override: 30% chance to Curse non-Cursed Enemies with a random Hex on Hit Limited to 1 Runegraft of Blasphemy
+1% to maximum Lightning Resistance +1 to Maximum Power Charges Limited to 1 Attribute Notable Tattoo
Buffs on you expire 30% slower Debuffs on you expire 30% faster Limited to 1 Runegraft of the Warp
20% chance for Skills to not consume a Cooldown on use Limited to 1 Runegraft of Time
